title: dusphemia #1426
definition:
1) the condition of one who is defamed
    1a) ill-repute, and the action of one who uses disgraceful language
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) the condition of one who is defamed
    1a) ill-repute, and the action of one who uses disgraceful language

    NASB:  to use evil words, to speak ill of:
